basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has published the Guest Faculty Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Guest Faculty position on a contractual basis. Candidates holding a Master’s Degree in Social Welfare from a recognized university in India are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Social Welfare from any recognized university of India
qualification.details: Master’s Degree in Social Welfare from any recognized university of India (MSW).

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DTU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DTU Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master’s Degree in Social Welfare from any recognized university of India (MSW).

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the DTU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Delhi Technological University (DTU) recruitment is Guest Faculty. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Guest Faculty post at Delhi Technological University (DTU).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s Degree in Social Welfare from any recognized university of India (MSW) to be eligible for the Guest Faculty role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Guest Faculty position at DTU is scheduled for 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DTU Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the Delhi Technological University (DTU) office.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Guest Faculty position at DTU is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
